summary.news_summary: 【テストモード】APIキーが設定されていないため、実際の要約は生成されていません。GEMINI_API_KEY環境変数を設定してください。収集された記事のタイトルのみ表示しています。
summary.opinion_summary: 【テストモード】メディアの意見分析はAPIキーが必要です。実際の運用時はGemini APIキーを設定することで、ポジティブ・ネガティブ・中立の意見分析が自動生成されます。

sentiment.positive: APIキー設定後に自動生成されます
sentiment.negative: APIキー設定後に自動生成されます
sentiment.neutral: APIキー設定後に自動生成されます

raw_articles.title: Meta's Louisiana data center investment to reach $50 billion, aided by generous tax incentives
raw_articles.summary: Meta said the planned Hyperion data center supercluster in Richland Parish, Louisiana, will be a 5GW facility and cost over $50 billion.

raw_articles.title: Waze is getting a bunch of new AI-powered features
raw_articles.summary: Waze is getting an AI makeover. Google is integrating its flagship AI assistant, Gemini, into the driving app with the goal of letting users personalize their trips a little more. Of the four new updates, only two are being described as involving Gemini. Waze says its updating its conversation reporting feature, first introduced in 2024, […]

raw_articles.title: Europe's Anduril rival Helsing raises $1.8 billion at $18 billion valuation
raw_articles.summary: Helsing said "investor demand significantly exceeded the available allocation" for its $1.8 billion funding round.

raw_articles.title: Elon Musk and Sam Altman spar on X after Apple files OpenAI lawsuit

raw_articles.title: Lorde says Ray-Ban Meta AI glasses are ‘not sexy’
raw_articles.summary: Lorde was performing at the Real Cool Festival in Madrid on Thursday and took some time during her set to speak out against AI glasses. While she didn't specify any brands in particular, it's likely she was taking a shot at festival sponsor Ray-Ban, which has collaborated with Meta on a pair of AI smartglasses. […]

raw_articles.title: Uber’s Autonomous Vehicle Strategy: Slow Their Adoption
raw_articles.summary: In at least two places, Uber has pushed a policy that could give it an advantage over developers of self-driving cars. The company says it’s fighting monopolies.

raw_articles.title: Apple’s failed self-driving car program left a legacy of powerful AI chips
raw_articles.summary: Apple's self-driving car program never really got off the ground, but it may have been what made the company's chips the powerful AI performers they are. Early in the development of the self-driving platform, Apple realized that it would need powerful on-device AI processing. While the car processor was never finished, as Mark Gurman details […]

raw_articles.title: DeepSeek cut prices 75%. The 100x problem remains
raw_articles.summary: DeepSeek's recent decision to drastically cut pricing on its V4-Pro model by 75% should have been unequivocally good news for enterprise AI vendors and developers. Instead, many are discovering that cheaper models don’t automatically translate into healthier margins.The reason is simple: While inference costs plummet, agent systems are voraciously consuming tokens faster than prices are declining. For the last 2 decades, software economics was dictated by the same rule. Infra became cheaper

raw_articles.title: Majority of U.S. workers support an AI wealth fund as tech layoffs surge, survey finds
raw_articles.summary: A majority of U.S. employees now want an AI sovereign wealth fund to hold corporations more accountable, according to a recent survey, as tech layoffs rise.
